seoTitle: Temora vs Ten Mile Hollow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Temora and Ten Mile Hollow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Temora vs Ten Mile Hollow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Temora and Ten Mile Hollow.
heading: Temora vs Ten Mile Hollow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Temora, New South Wales and Ten Mile Hollow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Temora has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ten Mile Hollow (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Temora or Ten Mile Hollow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Temora has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Ten Mile Hollow scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Temora scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Ten Mile Hollow scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Temora or Ten Mile Hollow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Temora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
